topic.title: Speaker Series: Enrique Sallent Zoom Recording
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

Here's the zoom recording of the Speaker Series (Enrique Sallent) from Saturday Jan 17.

https://northeastern.zoom.us/rec/share/p2Ll6LdSzOFX2zbSDGfO87hJc8zBmDi_Iy6MuBgAiwDBLEJC3OwrVzbhI-2Eoc7s.gP3RsWxwHjNq6QvY?startTime=1768669491000
Passcode: X+sp5g0e

 

Best,

Arundhati Bandopadhyaya

Teaching Assistant, INFO 7375
